[George_Maged_Portfolio.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29420344/George_Maged_Portfolio.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>George Maged Michelle — IT Technical Support & Systems Engineer</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');

  :root{
    --bg: #10161F;
    --panel: #161E2B;
    --panel-2: #1B2433;
    --border: #263041;
    --text: #EDEFF2;
    --muted: #8C97A6;
    --muted-2: #5F6B7A;
    --amber: #E8A33D;
    --teal: #3FA9A6;
    --online: #4CAF73;
  }

  *{ margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

  html{ scroll-behavior:smooth; }

  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }

  .wrap{ max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 32px; }

  h1,h2,h3{ font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:-0.01em; }

  .mono{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; }

  a{ color:inherit; }

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:12px;
    letter-spacing:0.12em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--amber);
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }

  .status-dot{
    width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--online);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(76,175,115,0.6);
    animation:pulse 2.4s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes pulse{
    0%{ box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(76,175,115,0.55); }
    70%{ box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(76,175,115,0); }
    100%{ box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(76,175,115,0); }
  }

  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  nav{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
    background:rgba(16,22,31,0.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  }
  nav .wrap{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; height:64px; }
  .logo{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:16px; }
  .logo span{ color:var(--amber); }
  nav ul{ display:flex; gap:28px; list-style:none; }
  nav a{ font-size:14px; color:var(--muted); text-decoration:none; transition:color .2s; }
  nav a:hover{ color:var(--text); }
  .nav-cta{
    border:1px solid var(--amber); color:var(--amber)!important;
    padding:8px 16px; border-radius:6px; font-size:13px!important;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover{ background:var(--amber); color:#10161F!important; }
  .nav-toggle{ display:none; }

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  header.hero{ padding:96px 0 80px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .hero-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.3fr 0.7fr; gap:56px; align-items:center; }
  .hero-name{ font-size:46px; line-height:1.08; margin-bottom:14px; }
  .hero-role{ font-size:19px; color:var(--teal); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; margin-bottom:22px; }
  .hero-desc{ color:var(--muted); font-size:16px; max-width:480px; margin-bottom:32px; }

  .contact-row{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:18px; margin-bottom:36px; }
  .contact-chip{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    font-size:13px; color:var(--muted);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  }
  .contact-chip svg{ width:15px; height:15px; stroke:var(--amber); flex-shrink:0; }

  .hero-ctas{ display:flex; gap:14px; }
  .btn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:13px; padding:13px 22px; border-radius:6px;
    text-decoration:none; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    transition: transform .15s ease, background .2s, color .2s;
  }
  .btn-primary{ background:var(--amber); color:#10161F; font-weight:500; }
  .btn-primary:hover{ transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-ghost{ border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text); }
  .btn-ghost:hover{ border-color:var(--teal); color:var(--teal); transform:translateY(-2px); }

  .photo-frame{
    position:relative; border-radius:14px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--panel);
  }
  .photo-frame img{ width:100%; display:block; }
  .photo-tag{
    position:absolute; bottom:14px; left:14px;
    background:rgba(16,22,31,0.85);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:11px; color:var(--online);
    padding:6px 10px; border-radius:5px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
  }

  /* heartbeat / signal line */
  .signal{ margin-top:46px; }
  .signal svg{ width:100%; height:46px; display:block; }
  .signal-path{
    fill:none; stroke:var(--teal); stroke-width:1.6;
    stroke-dasharray:4 1000;
    animation:draw 3.6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes draw{
    0%{ stroke-dashoffset:1000; }
    60%{ stroke-dashoffset:0; }
    100%{ stroke-dashoffset:0; }
  }
  .signal-label{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--muted-2); margin-top:6px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; }

  /* ---------- SECTION SHARED ---------- */
  section{ padding:76px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--border); }
  .section-head{ margin-bottom:44px; max-width:620px; }
  .section-head h2{ font-size:30px; }
  .section-head p{ color:var(--muted); margin-top:10px; font-size:15px; }

  /* ---------- STATS / SUMMARY ---------- */
  .summary-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr; gap:48px; align-items:start; }
  .summary-text{ color:var(--muted); font-size:15.5px; }
  .summary-text strong{ color:var(--text); font-weight:500; }
  .stats{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; }
  .stat-card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;
    padding:20px;
  }
  .stat-num{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-size:28px; color:var(--amber); font-weight:700; }
  .stat-label{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:4px; }

  /* ---------- EXPERIENCE (ticket cards) ---------- */
  .ticket{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;
    padding:28px 28px 26px; margin-bottom:20px; position:relative;
  }
  .ticket::before{
    content:''; position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:3px;
    background:var(--teal); border-radius:10px 0 0 10px;
  }
  .ticket-top{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-bottom:14px; }
  .ticket-role{ font-size:18px; font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:600; }
  .ticket-org{ color:var(--teal); font-size:14px; margin-top:3px; }
  .ticket-status{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px;
    border:1px solid var(--border); padding:5px 10px; border-radius:5px; color:var(--muted);
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .ticket-status.open{ color:var(--online); border-color:rgba(76,175,115,0.4); }
  .ticket ul{ list-style:none; color:var(--muted); font-size:14.5px; }
  .ticket li{ margin-bottom:9px; padding-left:20px; position:relative; }
  .ticket li::before{ content:'→'; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--teal); }
  .ticket li strong{ color:var(--text); }

  /* ---------- CERTS / BADGES ---------- */
  .cert-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap:16px; }
  .cert{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;
    padding:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
    transition: border-color .2s, transform .2s;
  }
  .cert:hover{ border-color:var(--teal); transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .cert-icon{
    width:42px; height:42px;
    background:rgba(63,169,166,0.15); border-radius:8px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .cert-icon svg{ width:24px; height:24px; stroke:var(--teal); }
  .cert-name{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; color:var(--text); }
  .cert-full{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:2px; }

  /* ---------- SKILLS ---------- */
  .skills-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap:20px; }
  .skill-col{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;
    padding:24px;
  }
  .skill-col h3{
    font-size:16px; margin-bottom:14px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  }
  .skill-col h3 svg{ width:20px; height:20px; stroke:var(--amber); flex-shrink:0; }
  .skill-col ul{ list-style:none; }
  .skill-col li{ font-size:14px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:8px; padding-left:16px; position:relative; }
  .skill-col li::before{ content:'◆'; position:absolute; left:4px; color:var(--teal); font-size:8px; }

  /* ---------- LANGUAGES ---------- */
  .lang-row{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap:24px; }
  .lang-item{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;
    padding:18px;
  }
  .lang-name{ font-size:14px; font-weight:500; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .lang-bar{ height:6px; background:var(--panel-2); border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; }
  .lang-fill{ background:var(--teal); height:100%; border-radius:3px; }
  .lang-level{ font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:8px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; }

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{
    background:var(--panel-2); border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:56px 0;
  }
  .ticket-form{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:12px;
    padding:40px; margin-bottom:40px; text-align:center;
  }
  .ticket-form h2{ font-size:32px; margin:16px 0; }
  .ticket-form p{ color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:24px; font-size:15px; }
  .ticket-form .btn{ margin:0 auto; }
  .footer-contacts{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap:16px;
    margin-top:24px;
  }
  .footer-contacts .contact-chip{
    flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; text-align:left;
  }
  .footer-bottom{
    font-size:12px; color:var(--muted-2); text-align:center;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
  }

  /* ---------- RESPONSIVE ---------- */
  @media(max-width:768px){
    .hero-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .summary-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    nav ul{ display:none; }
    .nav-toggle{ display:block; }
    .hero-name{ font-size:32px; }
    .section-head h2{ font-size:24px; }
    .skills-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>

<body>

<nav>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="logo">George<span>.</span></div>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="#summary">Summary</a></li>
      <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="#certifications">Certs</a></li>
      <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="nav-toggle">☰</button>
  </div>
</nav>

<header class="hero">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow"><span class="status-dot"></span> AVAILABLE NOW</div>
        <h1 class="hero-name">George Maged Michelle</h1>
        <div class="hero-role">
          <div style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 6px;">→ Technical Support</div>
          <div style="color: var(--teal); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600;">Infrastructure & System Administration</div>
        </div>
        <p class="hero-desc">Currently managing enterprise IT support at Bavaria Egypt. Proven hands-on expertise across Windows Server administration, infrastructure management, and complex technical troubleshooting. Transitioning toward System Administration and infrastructure roles.</p>
        <div class="contact-row">
          <div class="contact-chip">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg>
            Cairo, Egypt
          </div>
          <div class="contact-chip">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1"/><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1"/></svg>
            Full-Time | Relocation Open
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-ctas">
          <a href="mailto:george.m.michelle.it@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">Contact me →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="photo-frame">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="George Maged Michelle - IT Professional">
          <div class="photo-tag">
            <span class="status-dot"></span> Open to Opportunities
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="signal">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 800 80" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        <path class="signal-path" d="M0,40 L40,40 L60,20 L80,60 L100,40 L140,40 L160,10 L180,70 L200,40 L240,40 L260,30 L280,50 L300,40 L340,40 L360,20 L380,60 L400,40 L440,40 L460,25 L480,55 L500,40 L800,40"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="signal-label"><span>← Response Time</span><span>Uptime →</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<section id="summary">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2>Professional Summary</h2>
      <p>Bridging first-line support and infrastructure administration.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-grid">
      <div class="summary-text">
        <p>IT professional with <strong>hands-on experience spanning technical support, network infrastructure, and systems administration</strong>. Currently employed as a Technical Support Engineer at Bavaria Egypt, where I manage 50+ monthly support tickets while taking on progressive responsibilities in Windows Server administration, Active Directory management, and infrastructure monitoring.</p>
        <p style="margin-top:14px;">Strong foundation across <strong>MCSA, CCNA, and network security</strong> credentials. Actively expanding expertise in VMware virtualization and enterprise cloud services. Proven ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues, manage enterprise systems, and deliver reliable support across distributed environments.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-num">1.5+</div>
          <div class="stat-label">YEARS IT EXPERIENCE</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-num">50+</div>
          <div class="stat-label">MONTHLY TICKETS</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-num">5</div>
          <div class="stat-label">CERTIFICATIONS</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-num">2</div>
          <div class="stat-label">LANGUAGES</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="experience">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2>Experience</h2>
      <p>From helpdesk to infrastructure: progressive roles across support and systems.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="ticket">
      <div class="ticket-top">
        <div>
          <div class="ticket-role">IT Technical Support Engineer</div>
          <div class="ticket-org">Bavaria Egypt S.A.E</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ticket-status open mono">JUL 2025 — PRESENT</div>
      </div>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Technical Support:</strong> Handle 50+ monthly tickets for hardware, software, and network issues with rapid resolution</li>
        <li><strong>Systems Administration:</strong> Administer Windows systems, Active Directory user management, and group policies for enterprise users</li>
        <li><strong>Infrastructure:</strong> Install, configure, and troubleshoot printers, network devices, and peripherals across all branches</li>
        <li><strong>Deployment:</strong> Prepare, configure, and deploy laptops and desktops for new employees using standardized imaging</li>
        <li><strong>Remote Support:</strong> Deliver effective remote IT support across geographically distributed company branches</li>
        <li><strong>Application Support:</strong> Support Microsoft Office suite, email services, and business applications</li>
        <li><strong>Documentation:</strong> Document common issues, resolutions, and create knowledge base articles for team efficiency</li>
        <li><strong>Monitoring:</strong> Monitor network health using PRTG Network Monitor and generate system status reports</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="ticket">
      <div class="ticket-top">
        <div>
          <div class="ticket-role">IT Help Desk Engineer — Internship</div>
          <div class="ticket-org">Gabriel Group</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ticket-status mono">MARCH 2025</div>
      </div>
      <ul>
        <li>Assisted with network troubleshooting and device connectivity issues</li>
        <li>Installed and configured business applications to maximize user productivity</li>
        <li>Supported setup and troubleshooting of printers, network devices, and peripherals</li>
        <li>Provided first-level technical support through enterprise ticketing system</li>
        <li>Supported remote users and delivered hands-on IT training as needed</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="certifications">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2>Certifications & Credentials</h2>
      <p>Vendor and industry credentials supporting both support and administration roles.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-grid">
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">MCSA</div>
          <div class="cert-full">Microsoft Certified Solutions Associate</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/><circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2"/><circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2"/><path d="M12 7v6M12 13 7 17M12 13l5 4"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">CCNA</div>
          <div class="cert-full">Cisco Certified Network Associate</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2 4 5v6c0 5 3.5 8.5 8 11 4.5-2.5 8-6 8-11V5l-8-3Z"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">Network Security</div>
          <div class="cert-full">Cisco Network Security (NTI)</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">ICDL</div>
          <div class="cert-full">International Computer Driving License</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M9 9h6v6H9z"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">CompTIA A+</div>
          <div class="cert-full">Hardware & Operating Systems</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert">
        <div class="cert-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">HTML & CSS</div>
          <div class="cert-full">Front-end & Web Fundamentals</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="skills">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2>Core Technical Competencies</h2>
      <p>Practical expertise that spans support operations and systems administration.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-col">
        <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><rect x="2" y="14" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><path d="M6 6h.01M6 18h.01"/></svg> Systems & Infrastructure</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Windows Server Administration</li>
          <li>Active Directory & Group Policy</li>
          <li>DNS, DHCP & WINS Services</li>
          <li>Windows Troubleshooting & Optimization</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-col">
        <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="12" rx="2"/><path d="M2 20h20M9 16v4M15 16v4"/></svg> Networking & Cloud</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>CCNA Routing & Switching</li>
          <li>Network Security & Firewalls</li>
          <li>Virtualization (VMware, Hyper-V)</li>
          <li>Microsoft Azure Fundamentals</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-col">
        <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8Z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6"/></svg> Support & Operations</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Remote Technical Support (Remote Desktop, TeamViewer)</li>
          <li>Ticketing Systems & Documentation</li>
          <li>Hardware Deployment & Configuration</li>
          <li>Printer & Network Device Setup</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-col">
        <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M3 21v-2a4 4 0 0 1 4-4h4a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v2"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75M21 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.85"/></svg> Professional Competencies</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Problem Solving Under Pressure</li>
          <li>Effective Communication & Training</li>
          <li>Time Management & Prioritization</li>
          <li>Continuous Learning & Adaptability</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="languages">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2>Languages</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-row">
      <div class="lang-item">
        <div class="lang-name">Arabic</div>
        <div class="lang-bar"><div class="lang-fill" style="width:100%;"></div></div>
        <div class="lang-level">NATIVE</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-item">
        <div class="lang-name">English</div>
        <div class="lang-bar"><div class="lang-fill" style="width:60%;"></div></div>
        <div class="lang-level">INTERMEDIATE</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer id="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="ticket-form">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;"><span class="status-dot"></span> READY TO CONNECT</div>
      <h2>Let's work together</h2>
      <p>Open to IT support, systems administration, infrastructure roles, and junior network/sysadmin positions. Interested in progressive growth toward senior infrastructure roles.</p>
      <a href="mailto:george.m.michelle.it@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">Email George →</a>
      <div class="footer-contacts">
        <div class="contact-chip">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 6 12 13 2 6"/><path d="M2 6h20v12H2z"/></svg>
          <a href="mailto:george.m.michelle.it@gmail.com" style="text-decoration: none;">george.m.michelle.it@gmail.com</a>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-chip">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92Z"/></svg>
          +20 111 194 3876
        </div>
        <div class="contact-chip">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M8 14s1.5 2 4 2 4-2 4-2M9 9h.01M15 9h.01"/></svg>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-maged-it-system-admin" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;">LinkedIn Profile</a>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-chip">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 10c0 6-8 12-8 12s-8-6-8-12a8 8 0 1 1 16 0Z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>
          Cairo, Egypt
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">GEORGE MAGED MICHELLE — IT TECHNICAL SUPPORT & SYSTEMS ENGINEER</div>
  </div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
